holdings.infoBox: TPIF is an equity ETF with a total of 371 individual holdings. The top holdings are CLP Holdings stock at 0.71%, Fortis at 0.61%, Great-West Lifeco at 0.60%, Hydro One at 0.59%, and Emera at 0.57%.

overview.description: The Timothy Plan International ETF (TPIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of international stocks screened for defined Christian values. TPIF was launched on Dec 2, 2019 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
